description: 50 curated multi-entity incident scenarios for benchmarking the CyberScale aggregation, O-model, and classification matrix pipeline. Covers all T-levels, O-levels, and classification tiers with realistic NIS2 entity configurations.

incidents.name: WannaCry-style ransomware across EU hospitals
incidents.description: Ransomware worm exploiting unpatched SMB vulnerability spreads across healthcare providers in multiple member states, encrypting patient records and disabling medical devices.

incidents.name: NotPetya-style supply chain wiper attack
incidents.description: Destructive wiper malware disguised as ransomware propagates via compromised tax software update, devastating logistics, banking, and energy sectors across Europe.

incidents.name: SolarWinds-style supply chain espionage
incidents.description: Nation-state actor compromises a major IT management platform used by EU government agencies and critical infrastructure, enabling persistent access for months.

incidents.name: MOVEit-style file transfer zero-day exploitation
incidents.description: Mass exploitation of zero-day vulnerability in widely-used managed file transfer software, leading to data exfiltration from government and financial entities.

incidents.name: Colonial Pipeline-style energy ransomware
incidents.description: Ransomware attack on a major gas pipeline operator forces preventive shutdown, disrupting fuel supply and triggering cascading effects on transport and manufacturing.

incidents.name: Log4Shell-style zero-day in cloud infrastructure
incidents.description: Critical RCE vulnerability in a ubiquitous logging library enables mass exploitation of cloud providers and digital infrastructure across Europe.

incidents.name: Kaseya-style MSP ransomware cascade
incidents.description: Ransomware gang exploits vulnerability in remote management software used by managed service providers, encrypting hundreds of downstream customers across EU.

incidents.name: EU water treatment SCADA compromise
incidents.description: Coordinated attack on SCADA systems of drinking water facilities in two neighbouring member states, attempting to alter chemical treatment levels.

incidents.name: Cross-border railway signalling sustained disruption
incidents.description: Destructive cyberattack on railway signalling firmware causes sustained service disruption on major cross-border routes, requiring hardware replacement.

incidents.name: EU DNS infrastructure DDoS campaign
incidents.description: Massive distributed denial of service campaign targets EU DNS providers, causing intermittent resolution failures affecting thousands of downstream services.

incidents.name: Power grid cascading failure from cyber
incidents.description: Sophisticated attack on electricity transmission operators triggers cascading grid instability across Central Europe, with rolling blackouts lasting hours.

incidents.name: Banking sector credential stuffing wave
incidents.description: Large-scale automated credential stuffing campaign targets multiple EU banks, causing account lockouts and limited unauthorized fund transfers.

incidents.name: CDN provider compromise with data leak
incidents.description: A vulnerability in a CDN provider exposes cached sensitive data including API keys and session tokens from downstream customers in multiple sectors.

incidents.name: Airport IT system ransomware
incidents.description: Ransomware hits shared airport IT systems affecting flight operations and baggage handling at two major EU airports.

incidents.name: Trust service provider key compromise
incidents.description: Root key compromise at an EU-qualified trust service provider undermines digital signatures and certificates used by government and banking entities.

incidents.name: Pharmaceutical IP theft campaign
incidents.description: APT group targets pharmaceutical companies to access vaccine research data; limited data accessed before detection.

incidents.name: Satellite ground station jamming
incidents.description: Electromagnetic interference campaign disrupts satellite ground station operations affecting navigation and timing services.

incidents.name: Regional government sustained ransomware
incidents.description: Destructive ransomware with wiper component hits two regional government administrations, destroying backups and causing sustained loss of citizen services for weeks.

incidents.name: Wastewater SCADA intrusion
incidents.description: Unauthorized access to wastewater treatment SCADA systems in two facilities; attacker attempts to modify treatment parameters before detection.

incidents.name: Small ISP BGP hijack pair
incidents.description: Two small internet exchange point operators experience BGP hijacking, briefly redirecting traffic through unauthorized autonomous systems.

incidents.name: Port logistics ransomware
incidents.description: Ransomware hits two major port operators disrupting container handling and customs clearance at key European shipping hubs.

incidents.name: Financial market data feed manipulation
incidents.description: Attackers manipulate real-time market data feeds at a financial market infrastructure operator, causing brief trading anomalies before detection.

incidents.name: Medical device firmware backdoor
incidents.description: Backdoor discovered in firmware of widely-deployed medical infusion pumps and monitoring devices, affecting hospitals in three member states.

incidents.name: Postal service minor data access
incidents.description: Two national postal services experience unauthorized access to shipment tracking databases; no bulk exfiltration detected.

incidents.name: Multi-country search engine defacement
incidents.description: Hacktivist group defaces and temporarily degrades a major EU search engine, redirecting some users to propaganda pages.

incidents.name: Chemical plant OT network breach
incidents.description: Intrusion into operational technology networks at two chemical manufacturing plants, with attacker accessing but not modifying process control systems.

incidents.name: Waste management system minor breach
incidents.description: Low-sophistication attack accesses scheduling and routing systems of two waste management companies, causing minor service delays.

incidents.name: Food supply chain minor disruption
incidents.description: Phishing-initiated compromise at food production and distribution companies causes brief ERP system downtime and minor shipment delays.

incidents.name: Data centre minor cooling system incident
incidents.description: Low-impact unauthorized access to building management systems of two co-located data centres, with no customer data exposure.

incidents.name: Motor vehicle manufacturer pair phishing
incidents.description: Spear-phishing campaign compromises email accounts at two motor vehicle manufacturers, leaking limited design documents.

incidents.name: Social network and marketplace minor scraping
incidents.description: Automated scraping operation extracts public profile data from a social network and marketplace; no authentication bypass or private data accessed.

incidents.name: Cross-border electricity and gas disruption
incidents.description: Coordinated ransomware targets electricity and gas operators in the Baltics, disrupting energy supply during winter peak demand.

incidents.name: Managed security provider supply chain
incidents.description: Compromise of an MSSP's SIEM platform allows attackers to disable alerting and pivot into customer networks across multiple sectors.

incidents.name: Nordic banking trojan campaign
incidents.description: Banking trojan campaign targets Scandinavian credit institutions via compromised software updates, exfiltrating customer credentials.

incidents.name: EU cloud region sustained outage
incidents.description: Persistent attack on a cloud provider's EU region causes sustained service disruption affecting multiple downstream critical infrastructure operators.

incidents.name: Iberian electricity grid cyber intrusion
incidents.description: APT intrusion into Spanish and Portuguese electricity grid operators results in brief load shedding and data exfiltration of grid topology data within each country.

incidents.name: Multi-sector espionage via MSP compromise
incidents.description: State-sponsored actor uses compromised MSP as pivot point to access energy, transport, and government networks over several months.

incidents.name: Drinking water contamination scare duo
incidents.description: Attackers compromise drinking water monitoring systems across two member states via shared SCADA vendor, triggering false contamination alerts and public panic.

incidents.name: Government email system minor compromise
incidents.description: Spear-phishing campaign compromises limited email accounts at two central government entities; attacker access detected and revoked within hours.

incidents.name: Automotive supply chain ransomware
incidents.description: Ransomware spreads through interconnected supply chain systems of motor vehicle and machinery manufacturers, halting production lines.

incidents.name: Hospital ransomware with fatality
incidents.description: Ransomware attack on two hospitals forces emergency department diversions for weeks, directly contributing to patient death during rerouted ambulance transport.

incidents.name: Pan-EU telecom backbone sustained attack
incidents.description: Sophisticated persistent attack degrades core backbone infrastructure of major EU telecommunications and cloud providers over weeks.

incidents.name: Financial market trading halt attack
incidents.description: Coordinated attack forces trading halts at two EU financial market infrastructures, triggering market-wide circuit breakers.

incidents.name: Central EU gas pipeline OT compromise
incidents.description: APT group gains deep access to gas pipeline SCADA systems but is detected before causing physical disruption; extensive forensics and remediation required.

incidents.name: Research institution minor reconnaissance
incidents.description: Low-sophistication attackers probe research institution networks and access non-sensitive project metadata; no research data exfiltrated.

incidents.name: Minor regional government website defacement
incidents.description: Hacktivist group defaces and briefly disrupts websites of two regional government entities; no data compromised and service restored quickly.

incidents.name: Multi-entity shipping and port cyber incident
incidents.description: Ransomware spreads from a shipping company's booking system to connected port operators and a food distributor relying on cold chain logistics.

incidents.name: Non-NIS2 entities minor incident
incidents.description: Two non-NIS2 entities experience data breaches from a shared compromised SaaS platform, with limited impact scope.

incidents.name: Small electricity provider pair outage
incidents.description: Two small regional electricity undertakings in island member states suffer brief service degradation from a wiper variant spreading via shared vendor.

incidents.name: Pan-EU election infrastructure attack
incidents.description: Coordinated attack targets election-related government IT systems, voter registration databases, and public communication channels during EU election period.
